memory.summary: The strong odor from my roommate's unwashed clothes is severely disrupting my focus and sleep. Moving to the library now would restore my concentration for work.
Roommate R apologized and promised to handle the clothes issue. The odor problem is now resolved, allowing me to focus on work without further disruption.
The odor issue is resolved, yet my sleep debt remains due to past disruption. I must prioritize addressing the lingering fatigue before continuing work.
Progress on the reading response increased to 0.62 after two hours, but I still face a 2-hour sleep debt and moderate stress.
Roommate R returned to the room after resolving the odor issue, and my reading response progress improved to 0.73 despite lingering sleep debt and stress.
I realize Roommate R is not being inconsiderate and will respond kindly to my direct request. I have successfully messaged them about the odor while managing my own fatigue.
Reading response progress improved from 0.73 to 0.80 in two hours, confirming steady work despite existing sleep debt and stress.
Progress on the reading response increased from 0.80 to 0.86, confirming steady work despite lingering sleep debt and stress.
Worked 2 hours raising progress to 0.92 despite high stress and sleep debt, confirming consistent output under pressure.
Progress on the reading response rose from 0.92 to 0.98 in two hours, confirming continued steady output despite accumulating sleep debt and high stress.
The reading response is now complete at 1.00 progress, confirming sustained high output despite accumulating sleep debt and stress.
